questions.question: Do vaccines cause food allergies in children?
questions.rationale: Directly addresses a specific vaccine misinformation claim with established immunological evidence, while also connecting to evidence-based allergy prevention strategies
questions.misinformation_narrative: Many parents believe vaccines cause or increase the risk of food allergies in children, leading to vaccine hesitancy and delayed vaccination schedules
questions.public_stakes: Parents may delay or refuse vaccines, leaving children vulnerable to serious infectious diseases, while also potentially delaying beneficial early allergen introduction that actually prevents allergies

questions.public_stakes: Children may develop more food allergies due to delayed introduction, leading to lifelong dietary restrictions and potentially life-threatening reactions

questions.rationale: Addresses persistent misconceptions about cancer prognosis with current survival data and treatment effectiveness evidence

questions.public_stakes: Fear may delay cancer screening and treatment, while unrealistic expectations may lead to poor treatment decisions or inadequate end-of-life planning

questions.question: Are quantum effects relevant to biological processes in living organisms?
questions.rationale: Corrects both dismissive and exaggerated claims about quantum biology with emerging evidence of real quantum effects in photosynthesis, navigation, and other biological processes
questions.misinformation_narrative: Popular science often either dismisses quantum effects in biology as impossible or exaggerates their importance in consciousness and healing, while real quantum biology is an emerging field with specific applications
questions.public_stakes: Misunderstanding may lead to either dismissal of legitimate research or belief in unsubstantiated quantum healing claims, affecting both scientific funding and medical decision-making

questions.public_stakes: Patients may unnecessarily eliminate nutritious foods, waste money on unproven tests, and delay seeking appropriate medical evaluation for real food allergies or other conditions

questions.question: Do anti-aging supplements and treatments actually slow aging or extend lifespan?
questions.rationale: Addresses widespread marketing claims about anti-aging with evidence about what actually works versus what's commercially promoted
questions.misinformation_narrative: Many people believe various supplements, treatments, or lifestyle interventions can significantly slow aging or extend lifespan, despite limited evidence for most commercial anti-aging products
questions.public_stakes: People may waste money on unproven treatments, delay proven health interventions, or have unrealistic expectations about aging, while some anti-aging compounds may have cancer risks

questions.public_stakes: Legal cases may incorrectly assume identical twins cannot be distinguished genetically, while families may misunderstand genetic testing results and inheritance patterns

questions.question: Are most species on Earth already known to science?
questions.rationale: Corrects assumptions about biological knowledge completeness with evidence about the scope of undiscovered biodiversity
questions.misinformation_narrative: Many people assume most species have been discovered and cataloged, while evidence suggests the majority of Earth's species remain unknown, affecting conservation priorities and biodiversity understanding
questions.public_stakes: Underestimating unknown biodiversity may lead to inadequate conservation efforts and loss of species before they're discovered, while overestimating known diversity may reduce support for taxonomic research

questions.question: Is Artificial Intelligence actually intelligent or just advanced pattern matching?
questions.rationale: Addresses both AI hype and dismissiveness with evidence about what current AI systems can and cannot actually do
questions.misinformation_narrative: Public understanding swings between viewing AI as either truly intelligent/conscious or as mere statistical pattern matching, missing the nuanced reality of current AI capabilities and limitations
questions.public_stakes: Misunderstanding AI capabilities leads to either unrealistic fears about AI consciousness or dangerous overconfidence in AI decision-making for critical applications

questions.question: Can pharmacists provide the same level of clinical care as doctors for routine health services?
questions.rationale: Corrects misconceptions about pharmacist training and scope of practice with evidence about their effectiveness in specific healthcare roles
questions.misinformation_narrative: Some people view pharmacists as just pill dispensers while others may overestimate their diagnostic capabilities, missing their actual scope of practice for preventive care and medication management
questions.public_stakes: Underutilizing pharmacist services limits healthcare access and increases costs, while overreliance may delay necessary physician care for complex conditions

alternative_sources.resource_name: Pharmacist-led versus doctor-led treatment for chronic diseases
alternative_sources.description: Cochrane systematic review comparing clinical outcomes when pharmacists versus physicians manage chronic conditions like diabetes, hypertension, and cardiovascular disease
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides high-quality evidence on comparative effectiveness of pharmacist vs physician care for routine chronic disease management

alternative_sources.organization_full: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
alternative_sources.resource_name: Use of Clinical Decision Support to Improve Vaccination Rates
alternative_sources.description: CDC analysis of pharmacist-provided vaccination services and clinical outcomes compared to traditional healthcare settings
alternative_sources.relevance: Documents CDC's recognition of pharmacists' role in providing routine preventive care services with equivalent outcomes

alternative_sources.organization: Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality (AHRQ)

alternative_sources.resource_name: Pharmacy-Based Collaborative Care for Chronic Conditions: A Systematic Review
alternative_sources.description: AHRQ systematic review examining evidence for pharmacist-provided clinical care in collaborative practice models
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides federal health agency assessment of quality and safety of pharmacist clinical care delivery

alternative_sources.resource_name: Standards of Practice for Clinical Pharmacists
alternative_sources.description: Professional standards defining scope of clinical services pharmacists can provide and competency requirements
alternative_sources.relevance: Establishes the clinical training and practice standards that enable pharmacists to provide certain levels of patient care
